expected_query: Is it true that ₹500 notes will be stopped from ATMs by 2026?
expected_response: Some social media posts claim that the Reserve Bank of India will discontinue the circulation of ₹500 notes by March 2026.RBI has made NO such announcement. ₹500 notes have NOT been discontinued and remain legal tender. Don’t fall for such misinformation. Always verify news from official sources before believing or sharing it!.

expected_query: Is this post about the India–Bhutan hydropower project true?
expected_response: Claims about irregularities in the Punatsangchhu-II Hydroelectric Project are misleading. The project is implemented under a 2010 bilateral agreement between India and Bhutan. It is managed by PHPA-II with representation from both governments.

expected_query: Is India really planning incentives to revive dormant airports?
expected_response: The claim that India plans to roll out financial incentives to revive dormant airports is false. No such proposal is under consideration by the Government of India.
